titles.en: Chapter on Those Who Spend the Nights of Mina in Mecca
Chapter on Those Who Spend the Nights of Mina in Mecca

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَمَّنْ بَاتَ لَيَالِيَ مِنًى بِمَكَّةَ فَقَالَ «عَلَيْهِ ثَلاَثَةٌ مِنَ اَلْغَنَمِ يَذْبَحُهُنَّ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَمَّنْ بَاتَ لَيَالِيَ مِنًى بِمَكَّةَ فَقَالَ «عَلَيْهِ ثَلاَثَةٌ مِنَ اَلْغَنَمِ يَذْبَحُهُنَّ».

segments:
Hadith.3007 - Ibn Maskan narrated from Ja’far ibn Najiyah, from Abu Abdullah (as):
I asked him about someone who spends the nights of Mina in Mecca.
Imam (as) replied: "He must offer three sheep as a sacrifice."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3007 - Ibn Maskan narrated from Ja’far ibn Najiyah, from Abu Abdullah (as):
I asked him about someone who spends the nights of Mina in Mecca.
Imam (as) replied: "He must offer three sheep as a sacrifice."

narratorChain.raw: 3007 - رَوَى اِبْنُ مُسْكَانَ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ نَاجِيَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Those Who Spend the Nights of Mina in Mecca

segments: طَوَافِهِ وَ دُعَائِهِ وَ اَلسَّعْيِ وَ اَلدُّعَاءِ حَتَّى طَلَعَ اَلْفَجْرُ قَالَ «لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ كَانَ فِي طَاعَةِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ».
arabic.text: طَوَافِهِ وَ دُعَائِهِ وَ اَلسَّعْيِ وَ اَلدُّعَاءِ حَتَّى طَلَعَ اَلْفَجْرُ قَالَ «لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ كَانَ فِي طَاعَةِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ».

segments:
Hadith.3008 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who visited the House (Kaaba) and remained engaged in his circumambulation, supplications, and Sa'i (ritual walking) until dawn broke.
Imam (as) replied: "There is nothing upon him; he was engaged in the obedience of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3008 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who visited the House (Kaaba) and remained engaged in his circumambulation, supplications, and Sa'i (ritual walking) until dawn broke.
Imam (as) replied: "There is nothing upon him; he was engaged in the obedience of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic."

narratorChain.raw: 3008 - وَ سَأَلَهُ مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ : عَنْ رَجُلٍ زَارَ اَلْبَيْتَ فَلَمْ يَزَلْ فِي

titles.en: Chapter on Those Who Spend the Nights of Mina in Mecca

segments: : «إِذَا خَرَجْتَ مِنْ مِنًى قَبْلَ غُرُوبِ اَلشَّمْسِ فَلاَ تُصْبِحْ إِلاَّ بِهَا».
arabic.text: : «إِذَا خَرَجْتَ مِنْ مِنًى قَبْلَ غُرُوبِ اَلشَّمْسِ فَلاَ تُصْبِحْ إِلاَّ بِهَا».

segments:
Hadith.3009 - Jamil ibn Darraj narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he said:
"If you leave Mina before sunset, then do not let the morning come upon you except while you are still in Mina."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3009 - Jamil ibn Darraj narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he said:
"If you leave Mina before sunset, then do not let the morning come upon you except while you are still in Mina."

narratorChain.raw: 3009 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: 3009 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Those Who Spend the Nights of Mina in Mecca

segments: : «إِذَا خَرَجَ اَلرَّجُلُ مِنْ مِنًى أَوَّلَ اَللَّيْلِ فَلاَ يَنْتَصِفْ لَهُ اَللَّيْلُ إِلاَّ وَ هُوَ بِمِنًى وَ إِذَا خَرَجَ بَعْدَ نِصْفِ اَللَّيْلِ فَلاَ بَأْسَ أَنْ يُصْبِحَ بِغَيْرِهَا».
arabic.text: : «إِذَا خَرَجَ اَلرَّجُلُ مِنْ مِنًى أَوَّلَ اَللَّيْلِ فَلاَ يَنْتَصِفْ لَهُ اَللَّيْلُ إِلاَّ وَ هُوَ بِمِنًى وَ إِذَا خَرَجَ بَعْدَ نِصْفِ اَللَّيْلِ فَلاَ بَأْسَ أَنْ يُصْبِحَ بِغَيْرِهَا».

segments:
Hadith.3010 - Ja'far ibn Najiya narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he said:
"If a man leaves Mina at the beginning of the night, then the night should not reach its midpoint except while he is still in Mina. However, if he leaves after midnight, then it is permissible for him to spend the morning elsewhere."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3010 - Ja'far ibn Najiya narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he said:
"If a man leaves Mina at the beginning of the night, then the night should not reach its midpoint except while he is still in Mina. However, if he leaves after midnight, then it is permissible for him to spend the morning elsewhere."

narratorChain.raw: 3010 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ جَعْفَرُ بْنُ نَاجِيَةَ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: 3010 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ جَعْفَرُ بْنُ نَاجِيَةَ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Those Who Spend the Nights of Mina in Mecca

segments: 3011 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ تَدْخُلُوا مَنَازِلَكُمْ بِمَكَّةَ إِذَا زُرْتُمْ يَعْنِي أَهْلَ مَكَّةَ ».
arabic.text: 3011 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ تَدْخُلُوا مَنَازِلَكُمْ بِمَكَّةَ إِذَا زُرْتُمْ يَعْنِي أَهْلَ مَكَّةَ ».

segments:
Hadith.3011 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Do not enter your homes in Mecca when you have visited, meaning the residents of Mecca."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3011 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Do not enter your homes in Mecca when you have visited, meaning the residents of Mecca."

titles.en: Chapter on Those Who Spend the Nights of Mina in Mecca

segments: : «إِذَا زَارَ اَلْحَاجُّ مِنْ مِنًى فَخَرَجَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ فَجَازَ بُيُوتَ مَكَّةَ فَنَامَ ثُمَّ أَصْبَحَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَأْتِيَ مِنًى فَلاَ شَيْءَ عَلَيْهِ ».
arabic.text: : «إِذَا زَارَ اَلْحَاجُّ مِنْ مِنًى فَخَرَجَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ فَجَازَ بُيُوتَ مَكَّةَ فَنَامَ ثُمَّ أَصْبَحَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَأْتِيَ مِنًى فَلاَ شَيْءَ عَلَيْهِ ».

segments:
Hadith.3012 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Hisham ibn Al-Hakam, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"If a pilgrim visits from Mina, leaves Mecca, passes by the houses of Mecca, sleeps, and then wakes up before returning to Mina, there is no obligation upon him."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3012 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Hisham ibn Al-Hakam, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"If a pilgrim visits from Mina, leaves Mecca, passes by the houses of Mecca, sleeps, and then wakes up before returning to Mina, there is no obligation upon him."

narratorChain.raw: 3012 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ اَلْحَكَمِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
